summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that AEE is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $110.99. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 28.6%. The asset has recently tested this support 3 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $113.82 and a significant trendline confluence around $113.32 (formed by 2 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
